name: account-bridge
description: Generic BYOK plugin — connect user-owned AI API keys to unlock features in any app

scripts.smoke: node scripts/smoke-integration.mjs && node scripts/smoke-file-storage.mjs && node scripts/smoke-wallet.mjs && node scripts/smoke-wallet-host.mjs && node scripts/smoke-proxy.mjs && node scripts/smoke-platform.mjs
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @account-bridge/core && npm run build -w @account-bridge/platform && npm run build -w @account-bridge/billing && npm run build -w @account-bridge/ui && npm run build -w @account-bridge/gateway && npm run build -w @account-bridge/adapters && npm run build -w @account-bridge/server && npm run build -w @account-bridge/react && npm run build -w @account-bridge/web && npm run build -w @account-bridge/overlay && npm run build -w @account-bridge/proxy && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run smoke && npm run audit:security && npm run build
